parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto');const i=$json,p=i.payload||{};if(!i.project_id||!p.novel_id)throw new Error('INVALID_INPUT: project_id and payload.novel_id are required');const action=i.action||'run',v=Number(i.generation_version||1),key=p.idempotency_key||[i.project_id,'story_bible',p.novel_id,v,action].join(':');return [{json:{...i,stage:'story_bible',action,generation_version:v,trace_id:i.trace_id||`trace_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,task_id:`task_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,idempotency_key:key,payload:p,started_ms:Date.now()}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,started_at) VALUES($1,$2,$3,'story_bible',$4,'novel',$5,$6,$7,'running',$8,$9::jsonb,now()) ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4 IN ('retry','regenerate','resume') AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN 'running' ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.status END,retry_count=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4 IN ('retry','regenerate','resume') THEN drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count+1 ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count END RETURNING status,output_data,$10::jsonb AS request;
SELECT chunk_id,chunk_index,analysis_status,analysis_result FROM drama.novel_chunks WHERE project_id=$1 AND novel_id=$2 ORDER BY chunk_index;

parameters.jsCode: const req=$('Restore Request').first().json,rows=$input.all().map(x=>x.json);if(!rows.length)throw new Error('MISSING_CHUNK_ANALYSIS: no chunks');const failed=rows.filter(r=>r.analysis_status!=='completed');const allow=String($env.ALLOW_PARTIAL_STORY_BIBLE||'false')==='true'||req.payload.allow_partial===true;if(failed.length&&!allow)throw new Error(`MISSING_CHUNK_ANALYSIS: ${failed.length} chunk(s) incomplete`);const ok=rows.filter(r=>r.analysis_status==='completed');const crypto=require('crypto'),sid=s=>'x_'+crypto.createHash('sha1').update(s).digest('hex').slice(0,16);const batches=[];for(let n=0;n<ok.length;n+=20)batches.push(ok.slice(n,n+20));const chars=new Map(),locs=new Map(),relationships=[],world=[],timeline=[],events=[],foreshadowing=[];for(const batch of batches)for(const r of batch){const a=r.analysis_result||{};for(const x of a.characters||[]){const names=[x.name,...(x.aliases||[])].filter(Boolean),key=(names[0]||'未知').toLowerCase();let c=chars.get(key)||{character_id:sid('char:'+key),canonical_name:names[0]||'未知',aliases:[],gender:x.gender||'unknown',age:x.estimated_age??null,identity:x.identity||'',appearance:[],personality:[],relationships:[],source_chunk_ids:[]};c.aliases=[...new Set([...c.aliases,...names.slice(1)])];c.appearance=[...new Set([...c.appearance,...(x.appearance||[])])];c.personality=[...new Set([...c.personality,...(x.personality||[])])];c.relationships.push(...(x.relationships||[]));c.source_chunk_ids=[...new Set([...c.source_chunk_ids,r.chunk_id])];chars.set(key,c);}for(const x of a.locations||[]){const name=typeof x==='string'?x:(x.name||x.canonical_name||'未知地点'),key=name.toLowerCase();let l=locs.get(key)||{location_id:sid('loc:'+key),canonical_name:name,aliases:[],description:typeof x==='object'?(x.description||''):'',source_chunk_ids:[]};l.source_chunk_ids=[...new Set([...l.source_chunk_ids,r.chunk_id])];locs.set(key,l);}for(const x of a.events||[])events.push({...x,source_chunk_ids:[...new Set([...(x.source_chunk_ids||[]),r.chunk_id])]});for(const x of a.world_rules||[])world.push({value:x,source_chunk_ids:[r.chunk_id]});for(const x of a.timeline_clues||[])timeline.push({value:x,source_chunk_ids:[r.chunk_id]});for(const x of a.foreshadowing||[])foreshadowing.push({value:x,source_chunk_ids:[r.chunk_id]});for(const c of a.characters||[])relationships.push(...(c.relationships||[]).map(x=>({...x,source_chunk_ids:[r.chunk_id]})));}const bible={story_bible_id:`sb_${crypto.createHash('sha1').update(req.project_id+':'+req.generation_version).digest('hex').slice(0,20)}`,project_id:req.project_id,version:req.generation_version,characters:[...chars.values()],relationships,locations:[...locs.values()],world_rules:world,timeline,key_events:events,foreshadowing,source_chunk_ids:ok.map(x=>x.chunk_id),partial:failed.length>0};return [{json:{...req,bible,failed_count:failed.length,compact_for_ai:{characters:bible.characters,locations:bible.locations,key_events:bible.key_events.slice(0,300),world_rules:bible.world_rules,timeline:bible.timeline,foreshadowing:bible.foreshadowing}}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ {model:$env.STORY_BIBLE_MODEL||'glm-5.2',temperature:0.1,max_tokens:Number($env.MODEL_MAX_TOKENS||4096),response_format:{type:'json_object'},messages:[{role:'system',content:'你是故事圣经编辑。合并同名人物和地点，修正明显重复，但不得删除 source_chunk_ids/evidence。只输出严格 JSON，字段为 characters,relationships,locations,world_rules,timeline,key_events,foreshadowing。'},{role:'user',content:JSON.stringify($json.compact_for_ai)}]} }}

parameters.jsCode: const base=$('Batch Merge and Canonicalize').item.json;let raw=$json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content;if(typeof raw!=='string')throw new Error('INVALID_AI_RESPONSE: missing story bible JSON');const x=JSON.parse(raw.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/```$/,'').replace(/,\s*([}\]])/g,'$1').trim());for(const k of ['characters','relationships','locations','world_rules','timeline','key_events','foreshadowing'])if(!Array.isArray(x[k]))throw new Error(`INVALID_AI_SCHEMA: ${k}`);const ids=new Set(base.bible.source_chunk_ids);const safe=v=>{for(const o of v)if(o&&typeof o==='object'&&Array.isArray(o.source_chunk_ids))o.source_chunk_ids=o.source_chunk_ids.filter(id=>ids.has(id));return v};base.bible={...base.bible,...Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(x).map(([k,v])=>[k,safe(v)]))};return [{json:{...base,usage:$json.usage||{},estimated_cost:0}}];

parameters.query: WITH sb AS (INSERT INTO drama.story_bibles(story_bible_id,project_id,version,status,characters,relationships,locations,world_rules,timeline,key_events,foreshadowing,source_chunk_ids) VALUES($1,$2,$3,'pending_review',$4::jsonb,$5::jsonb,$6::jsonb,$7::jsonb,$8::jsonb,$9::jsonb,$10::jsonb,$11::jsonb) ON CONFLICT(project_id,version) DO UPDATE SET status='pending_review',characters=excluded.characters,relationships=excluded.relationships,locations=excluded.locations,world_rules=excluded.world_rules,timeline=excluded.timeline,key_events=excluded.key_events,foreshadowing=excluded.foreshadowing,source_chunk_ids=excluded.source_chunk_ids RETURNING story_bible_id), rv AS (INSERT INTO drama.review_tasks(review_id,project_id,stage,entity_type,entity_id,review_status) VALUES($12,$2,'story_bible','story_bible',$1,'pending') ON CONFLICT(review_id) DO UPDATE SET review_status=drama.review_tasks.review_status RETURNING review_id), done AS (UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status='completed',completed_at=now(),output_data=jsonb_build_object('success',true,'project_id',$2,'trace_id',$13,'stage','story_bible','status','completed','data_ref',jsonb_build_object('entity_type','story_bible','entity_id',$1,'review_id',$12),'metrics',jsonb_build_object('duration_ms',$14,'input_chunks',jsonb_array_length($11::jsonb),'output_tokens',$15,'estimated_cost',$16),'error',NULL) WHERE idempotency_key=$17 RETURNING output_data) SELECT output_data FROM done;
UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status='failed',error_code=$1,error_message=$2,completed_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$3; SELECT $4::jsonb AS response;
